title: Step 1: Create a New CornerFinder Object
description:
Step 1: Create a New CornerFinder Object

Step 1: Create a New CornerFinder Object

	Click the [All Tools] -  [CornerFinder]
	 button on the Vision Guide toolbar.
	Move the mouse over the image display.

	You will see the mouse pointer change to the CornerFinder object icon.
	Continue moving the mouse until the icon is at the
	 desired position in the image display.
	Click the left mouse button to create the object.
	Notice that a name for the
	 object is automatically created.

	In the example, it is called "CornerFind01" because this is the first
	 CornerFinder object created for this sequence.  (We will explain
	 how to change the name later.)
